'''Harvest Day''' was a [[holiday]] in the [[Tapani sector/Legends|Tapani sector]]. The celebration was brought to the sector by the original settlers, but the reason for its observance were lost by the time of the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. It was believed that the original purpose for the holiday was to commemorate the harvest of crops, but no one knew for certain. Most observers welcomed it as a chance to take a day off from work.<ref name="LE">''[[Lords of the Expanse]]''</ref>
